title: melia azedarach var. japonica
intro: Melia azedarach var. japonica, also known as the Japanese chinaberry or Japanese pride of India, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Melia azedarach var. japonica include its potential to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and other medicinal products.
